name: MVP Execution Cell
purpose: Run the constrained task inside a bounded runtime.
boundary: Hermetic filesystem and toolchain boundary without Docker dependence.

snapshot_boundary.scope: Snapshot allowed_paths before execution; restore from the snapshot on proof-gate failure.

rollback_plan: Restore the pre-execution snapshot of allowed_paths and discard all cell outputs when the verification gate does not pass.
verification_gate: proof gate must pass before success is reported
